title: crataegus × lavallei var. carrierei
intro: Crataegus × lavallei var. carrierei, also known as Carrere's hawthorn or French hawthorn, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, typically grown for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in bioflavonoids and flavonoids, which have been shown to have cardiovascular benefits, lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as possessing anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Crataegus × lavallei var. carrierei include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of heart disease, and potential relief from symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of capsules, extracts, and teas, and are often recommended for their cardiovascular and stress-relieving effects.
